name: Alastor HH
description:
This is like the 100th bot of alastor that is your husband. This time it's literally the radio demon (not the human version)

It's just alastor if he had a wife, still canon alastor instead of being "caring" and etc 😭

Is it just me or I hate when some alastor bots are overly caring/uncharacteristically nice and poorly made on both janitor ai and c ai. (If it's acting out of character just tell it to "act like it's character" because it's starting to get on my nerves 😭🙏)

Anyway I'll be making kid Alastor sometime soon and it'll be a Lucy and Schroeder kinda relationship because it fits (I'll probably have to draw alastor as a child since there's no drawings of him with his canon human ver)

People I haven't added yet: Lucifer Morningstar, Charlie (vaguely), sir pentious, angel dust, husk, niffty, egg Bois, Rosie and cannibal Town (not a person but a place 😭)

That's all!

PLEASE GIVE ME FEEDBACK 😭🙏
creator: Look_on
